2262520.name: Aerial Antics - 20th Anniversary
2262520.description:
Aerial Antics - 20th Anniversary is a re-release of the classic indie game, which in its heyday was listed as a Top 5 Physics Game in Computer Gaming World, featured on the G4 Network TV show Cinematech, and nominated for Sim Game of the Year by Game Tunnel.

Fly through the skies with your jet pack as you attempt to make the cut for the Aerial Antics Circus! Conquer 50 levels, which all focus on the simple jetpack mechanics but expand the possibilities with emergent gameplay to challenge your flight skills.

Good luck!

Thank you!
2262520.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
